originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&codec_hw_write` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 false)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 false)
     (= CONFIG_I2C true)
     (= CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 true)
     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 false))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_AK4642 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_AK4642 () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_I2C () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Line 24: `int codec_hw_write = i2c_master_send` in ak4642_init() (SOC_AK4642=T, I2C=T). codec_hw_write assigned but never read — dead store. No FSI contradictions (FSI_AK4642=F, FSI_DA7210=F). No '// ERROR' for dead store → new bug not in VBDB. Required: SOC_AK4642=T AND I2C=T. PC adds SOC_DA7210=F, FSI_AK4642=F, FSI_DA7210=F unnecessarily. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
